title: Add multiple volumes from text file with one src:dest per line
body:
### Feature request description

Environment variables can be stacked together in a file line by line to be included by `--env-file` instead of providing many `-e ... -e ...`. Just like this but for volumes, I miss a `--volumes-file`. Priority low, of course. 

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: This sounds like a good candidate for our existing config file modules?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

as said you can use modules already for something like this which allows you to use a containers.conf syntax file which has a volume option
https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman.1.html#module-path
